ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-mono
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebot-ai/bytebot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebot-ai/bytebot
Language: typescript
Bytebot is a self-hosted AI desktop agent that automates computer tasks through natural language commands, operating within a containerized Linux desktop environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danny-avila/LibreChat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danny-avila/LibreChat
Language: typescript
Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: delibae/claude-prism
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/delibae/claude-prism
Language: typescript
An offline-first scientific writing workspace powered by Claude. LaTeX + Python + 100+ scientific skills all running locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/open-lovable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/open-lovable
Language: typescript
🔥 Clone and recreate any website as a modern React app in seconds

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iptv-org/iptv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iptv-org/iptv
Language: typescript
Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mui/base-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mui/base-ui
Language: typescript
Unstyled UI components for building accessible web apps and design systems. From the creators of Radix, Floating UI, and Material UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: musistudio/claude-code-router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/musistudio/claude-code-router
Language: typescript
Use Claude Code as the foundation for coding infrastructure, allowing you to decide how to interact with the model while enjoying updates from Anthropic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: novuhq/novu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/novuhq/novu
Language: typescript
The open-source notification infrastructure. In-app Inbox component, E-mail, SMS, Push and Slack Integrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
Language: typescript
Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tldraw/tldraw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tldraw/tldraw
Language: typescript
very good whiteboard infinite canvas SDK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xiaoY233/Chat2API
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiaoY233/Chat2API
Language: typescript
Chat2API enables zero-cost access to leading AI models by leveraging official web UIs. It supports providers such as DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, Qwen, and Z.ai, and seamlessly integrates with tools like openlcaw, Cline, and Roo-Code.
